name: Materials Lab
description: Autonomous materials-science research tools and local Python workflows for OpenClaw.

pythonPath.label: Python executable
pythonPath.help: Used to launch the local materials worker.

mpApiKey.label: Materials Project API key
mpApiKey.help: Optional for offline mode, required for live Materials Project queries.

workspaceRoot.label: Workspace root
workspaceRoot.help: All notes, reports, structures, plots, and cache files stay under this directory.

defaultBatchLimit.label: Default batch limit
defaultBatchLimit.help: Upper bound for candidate batches in screening workflows.
